campaigns.title: Clean City Drive
campaigns.description: Weekend cleanup campaign covering public streets, footpaths, and bin overflow hotspots.

campaigns.title: Lakefront Plastic Cleanup
campaigns.description: Citizen-led drive to collect plastic bottles, wrappers, and mixed litter near the lake edge.

campaigns.title: Neighborhood Compost Action Day
campaigns.description: A ward-level campaign focused on wet waste segregation and community composting awareness.

campaigns.title: E-Waste Collection Marathon
campaigns.description: Collection event for obsolete electronics with safe routing to approved recyclers.

campaigns.title: Construction Debris Clearance Camp
campaigns.description: Joint volunteer and civic drive to clear debris dumped along neighborhood roads and drains.

campaigns.title: Monsoon Drain Cleanup Campaign
campaigns.description: Pre-monsoon drain desilting support drive to remove visible waste blockage points.
